text.title: Testimonial Harvest — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a `HarvestRecord` covering written, video, and metric artifacts per engagement.

list.item: `triggers_fired` — array of `{trigger ∈ {T1, T2, T3}, fired_at, ack_received}`
`consent_matrix` — array of `{artifact, usage ∈ {site, social, ads, case-study, sales-deck}, granted: bool, granted_at}`
`closed_at` — ISO date when harvest window opened

antipattern.reason: Written quote is the only mandatory artifact. Without it, status is `partial` at best.

antipattern.description: `consent_matrix` uses blanket "all uses" grant without per-usage breakdown.

antipattern.reason: Violates r4. Skip harvest, route to post-mortem.

antipattern.description: Outreach attempts > 3 OR window > 90 days from closed_at.

antipattern.reason: Unsourced metrics invite fabrication. Source quote anchors the number.

list.item: Anonymise customer.company to industry+size for case studies (with consent).
Round metrics to 2 significant figures for sharing.
Re-encode Loom video for site embedding (preserve original Loom URL).
NPS gate passed (≥ 7) or status explicitly `skipped`.
All three triggers logged (even if no reply).
Consent matrix populated per (artifact, usage) pair.
Harvest closed by T+90 (status lost OR complete).
